helm_deployment_guide.overview: Comprehensive guide for creating Helm charts to deploy the modernized ABC Bank application on Kubernetes/OpenShift. This includes all required manifests, configuration, and deployment procedures.

requirement.rule: ALL Kubernetes manifests MUST be Helm-templated
requirement.rationale: No standalone YAML files - everything must go through Helm
requirement.forbidden: Raw Kubernetes YAML files outside Helm templates

requirement.rule: PostgreSQL MUST use emptyDir volume ONLY
requirement.implementation: Use Deployment (not StatefulSet) with emptyDir volume

requirement.rule: Database credentials MUST be in Kubernetes Secrets
requirement.implementation: Create secrets.yaml and reference in deployments

requirement.rationale: Kubernetes needs to know when app is ready
requirement.implementation: Configure liveness and readiness probes using Actuator endpoints

helm_chart_structure.directory_layout: helm/ └── abc-bank/ ├── Chart.yaml # Chart metadata ├── values.yaml # Default configuration values ├── .helmignore # Files to ignore └── templates/ ├── _helpers.tpl # Template helpers ├── NOTES.txt # Post-install notes ├── secrets.yaml # Database credentials ├── postgres-deployment.yaml ├── postgres-service.yaml ├── app-deployment.yaml ├── app-service.yaml └── route.yaml # OpenShift Route

file_purposes.file: Chart metadata including name, version, description
Default configuration values that can be overridden during installation
Reusable template functions for labels, names, etc.
Service to expose PostgreSQL within cluster

chart_yaml.template:
apiVersion: v2 name: abc-bank description: Modernized ABC Bank Application - Spring Boot with PostgreSQL type: application version: 1.0.0 appVersion: "2.0.0"
keywords: - banking - spring-boot - postgresql - modernization
home: https://github.com/abcbank/abc-bank-modernized sources: - https://github.com/abcbank/abc-bank-modernized
maintainers: - name: ABC Bank DevOps Team email: devops@abcbank.com
icon: https://example.com/abc-bank-icon.png
annotations: category: Banking licenses: Apache-2.0

values_yaml.template:
# Default values for abc-bank Helm chart # This is a YAML-formatted file. # Declare variables to be passed into your templates.
# Global settings global: nameOverride: "" fullnameOverride: ""
# Application configuration app: name: abc-bank replicaCount: 1
image: repository: abc-bank-backend tag: latest pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
service: type: ClusterIP port: 8080 targetPort: 8080
resources: limits: cpu: 500m memory: 512Mi requests: cpu: 250m memory: 256Mi
# Health check configuration livenessProbe: httpGet: path: /actuator/health/liveness port: 8080 initialDelaySeconds: 60 periodSeconds: 10 timeoutSeconds: 5 failureThreshold: 3
readinessProbe: httpGet: path: /actuator/health/readiness port: 8080 initialDelaySeconds: 30 periodSeconds: 5 timeoutSeconds: 3 failureThreshold: 3
# Environment variables env: javaOpts: "-Xmx384m -Xms256m" springProfile: "prod" logLevel: "INFO"
# PostgreSQL configuration postgresql: enabled: true
image: repository: postgres tag: "15-alpine" pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
service: type: ClusterIP port: 5432
resources: limits: cpu: 500m memory: 512Mi requests: cpu: 250m memory: 256Mi
# CRITICAL: emptyDir configuration (no PVC) persistence: enabled: false # Disable PVC storageClass: ""
# Volume configuration volume: name: postgres-data mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data subPath: pgdata # Avoid permission issues
# Health checks livenessProbe: exec: command: - /bin/sh - -c - pg_isready -U $POSTGRES_USER initialDelaySeconds: 30 periodSeconds: 10 timeoutSeconds: 5 failureThreshold: 3
readinessProbe: exec: command: - /bin/sh - -c - pg_isready -U $POSTGRES_USER initialDelaySeconds: 5 periodSeconds: 5 timeoutSeconds: 3 failureThreshold: 3
# Database credentials (will be stored in Secret) database: name: abcbank username: abcbank password: changeme123 # Change in production!
# OpenShift Route configuration route: enabled: true host: "" # Auto-generated if empty path: / tls: enabled: true termination: edge insecureEdgeTerminationPolicy: Redirect
# Service Account serviceAccount: create: true annotations: {} name: ""
# Pod annotations podAnnotations: {}
# Pod security context podSecurityContext: fsGroup: 1000
# Container security context securityContext: runAsNonRoot: true runAsUser: 1000 allowPrivilegeEscalation: false capabilities: drop: - ALL
# Node selector nodeSelector: {}
# Tolerations tolerations: []
# Affinity affinity: {}

postgres_deployment_yaml.critical_note: MUST use emptyDir volume, NOT PersistentVolumeClaim. Use Deployment, NOT StatefulSet.
postgres_deployment_yaml.template: {{- if .Values.postgresql.enabled }} apiVersion: apps/v1 kind: Deployment metadata: name: {{ include "abc-bank.postgresql.fullname" . }} labels: {{- include "abc-bank.labels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database spec: replicas: 1 strategy: type: Recreate # Important for database selector: matchLabels: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database template: metadata: labels: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: database spec: containers: - name: postgresql image: "{{ .Values.postgresql.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.postgresql.image.tag }}" imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.postgresql.image.pullPolicy }} ports: - name: postgresql containerPort: {{ .Values.postgresql.service.port }} protocol: TCP env: - name: POSTGRES_DB valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-name - name: POSTGRES_USER valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-user - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }}-db-secret key: database-password - name: PGDATA value: {{ .Values.postgresql.volume.mountPath }}/{{ .Values.postgresql.volume.subPath }} volumeMounts: - name: {{ .Values.postgresql.volume.name }} mountPath: {{ .Values.postgresql.volume.mountPath }} resources: {{- toYaml .Values.postgresql.resources | nindent 10 }} {{- with .Values.postgresql.livenessProbe }} livenessProbe: {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }} {{- end }} {{- with .Values.postgresql.readinessProbe }} readinessProbe: {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }} {{- end }} volumes: - name: {{ .Values.postgresql.volume.name }} emptyDir: {} # CRITICAL: emptyDir only, no PVC! {{- end }}

app_service_yaml.template: apiVersion: v1 kind: Service metadata: name: {{ include "abc-bank.fullname" . }} labels: {{- include "abc-bank.labels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend spec: type: {{ .Values.app.service.type }} ports: - port: {{ .Values.app.service.port }} targetPort: http protocol: TCP name: http selector: {{- include "abc-bank.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }} app.kubernetes.io/component: backend

deployment_workflow.title: Helm Deployment Workflow
deployment_workflow.description: Step-by-step process to deploy the application using Helm

step.note: For local testing, you can use locally built images without pushing to registry

step.expected_output: No errors or warnings from helm lint Valid Kubernetes manifests from helm template

step.expected_sequence: 1. PostgreSQL pod starts and becomes ready 2. Application pod starts 3. Application connects to PostgreSQL 4. Health checks pass 5. Route becomes accessible

commands.command: curl https://$(oc get route abc-bank -o jsonpath='{.spec.host}')/actuator/health
export ROUTE_HOST=$(oc get route abc-bank -o jsonpath='{.spec.host}')

diagnosis.command: curl -v https://$(oc get route abc-bank -o jsonpath='{.spec.host}')

validation_checklist.item: Helm chart validates with helm lint
Templates render correctly with helm template
